zh.lifeSummary: Radulphus De Weston II是Radulphus De Weston I和Mrs. Ralph de Weston的兒子，於1073年出生在英國英格蘭素可尼。他於1124年與Mrs. Ralph de Weston在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1120年在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

en.lifeSummary: Radulphus De Weston II was born in 1073, in Heene, Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Radulphus De Weston I and Mrs. Ralph de Weston. He married Mrs. Ralph de Weston in 1124, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1120, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

Il a épousé Mrs. Ralph de Weston en 1124, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1120, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Ralph de Weston в 1124 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1120 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
